calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR SHORT CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-24-2006 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Aug-30-2006 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter came regularly on calendar this day, by assignment from the Department of the Presiding Judge for Court Trial Prove-Up.
Dept. 218, VJ: Ollie Marie-Victoire, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Floyd Butler.
Lorna Walker, Esq. for Plaintiffs: GEO logistics, a corporation.
Plaintiff's Witness: Thomas Neuert, was sworn and direct examined.
No appearance by the Defendant: Euro Wrap LTD.
After hearing the tetimony presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defendant as follows:
Damages $31,386.55
Prejudgment Interest $5,275.15
Attorney's Fees $1,000.00
Costs $380.50, for a Total of $38,042.17
Counsel to prepare Judgment for signature.

Aug. 30, 2006
Judgment signed and entered.

MASTER CALENDAR SHORT CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-26-2006 Continued To Jul-24-06 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Ntc Of Motion To Continue Trial Date
Off Calendar Apr-26-2006 Text Ruling

Off Calendar Mar-09-2006 Set For Trial On May-22-06 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
